name: Variant C (re-run): matched_mismatch_v2 wrapping plan_and_solve_v3
short_description: Re-run of variant C on the 130 paired t0026 instances using the new matched_mismatch_v2 library that retargets the t0010 mismatch wrapper at plan_and_solve_v3 (rather than scope_aware_react), fixing the wrong-delegate defect (S-0026-02) that made t0026's variant C structurally identical to A.
model_description: claude-sonnet-4-6 via Anthropic API (CLI transport). max_turns=10, max_tokens=4096. The agent is matched_mismatch_v2 (built in this task) which forks t0010's mismatch wrapper to delegate to PlanAndSolveAgentV3 instead of the original scope_aware_react. The wrapper still applies the adversarial granularity perturbation map (global -> atomic, subtask -> atomic, atomic -> global) to the t0010-style synthetic v2 hierarchy before running the underlying agent, producing the same shape of mismatched conditioning as t0010 but now over a plan_and_solve scaffold. The plan-parse 3-attempt recovery chain from plan_and_solve_v3 is inherited unchanged. Note: model is claude-sonnet-4-6 to match what t0026 actually ran; the original t0027 task description erroneously stated claude-opus-4-7 and was corrected after discovering the mismatch via t0026's paths.py.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: instance_id (str), subset (str), variant (str), final_answer (str|null), final_confidence (float|null; 0..1 verbalised confidence), cost_usd (float), trajectory_path (str|null; absolute path to the per-instance trajectory JSON in data/runs/c/), judge_sonnet_success (bool), judge_sonnet_rationale (str), plan_parser_recovery_path (str; one of 'clean', 'reprompt', 'json_mode', 'all_failed', 'unknown'), plan_parser_attempts (int; 1..3), raised_malformed_plan_error (bool; True iff all three plan-parse attempts failed), delegate (str; 'scope_unaware_planandsolve_v3' on every row in this asset).

files.description: Per-instance predictions for variant C on the 130-paired set (SWE+Tau+FS) with the primary sonnet judge verdict attached. The plan_parser_recovery_path/plan_parser_attempts fields are inherited from the underlying plan_and_solve_v3 run and the delegate field records which library was wrapped (always plan_and_solve_v3 for this asset).
